requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Nepal Local Fire and Building Authority Approval Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——尼泊尔地方消防及建筑主管机关审批要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——尼泊爾地方消防及建築主管機關審批要求

summary.en: Nepal does not have a confirmed single national fire authority equivalent to centralized fire code bodies in more developed markets. Fire safety and building approvals for commercial and industrial installations — including BESS — are administered by local government bodies: municipality-level offices (metropolitan, sub-metropolitan, and rural municipalities) under Nepal's local government framework. Nepal Building Code and applicable local building by-laws govern installation safety requirements. No dedicated national fire code specifically for stationary BESS installations has been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. International BESS projects in Nepal typically reference IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based energy storage systems) and IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) as the safety documentation baseline in project specifications and financing requirements. Thermal runaway mitigation, ventilation, fire suppression design, and emergency shutdown procedures are internationally expected elements of BESS installation safety documentation.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔没有经确认的等同于更发达市场集中消防规范机构的单一全国消防主管机关。商业及工业装置（包括BESS）的消防安全和建筑审批由尼泊尔地方政府框架下的地方政府机构负责：市政级别的机构（大都市、次大都市及农村市政机构）。尼泊尔建筑规范及适用的地方建筑法规管理安装安全要求。截至本数据集日期，尚未从可公开获取的官方来源确认任何专门针对固定式BESS安装的全国性消防规范。尼泊尔的国际BESS项目通常在项目规格和融资要求中将IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）和IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）作为安全文件基准。热失控缓解、通风、消防抑制设计及紧急停机程序是BESS安装安全文件的国际预期要素。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾沒有經確認的等同於更發達市場集中消防規範機構的單一全國消防主管機關。商業及工業裝置（包括BESS）的消防安全和建築審批由尼泊爾地方政府框架下的地方政府機構負責：市政級別的機構（大都市、次大都市及農村市政機構）。尼泊爾建築規範及適用的地方建築法規管理安裝安全要求。截至本數據集日期，尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源確認任何專門針對固定式BESS安裝的全國性消防規範。尼泊爾的國際BESS項目通常在項目規格和融資要求中將IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）和IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）作為安全文件基準。熱失控緩解、通風、消防抑制設計及緊急停機程序是BESS安裝安全文件的國際預期要素。

standards_or_laws: Nepal Building Code (NBC) — national building safety framework; administered locally by municipalities
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification and lender-requirement reference for Nepal BESS installations)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (cell and module safety baseline referenced in Nepal project specifications)
Local municipality fire and building approval — required from the relevant metropolitan, sub-metropolitan, or rural municipality office before commissioning

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Nepal local authorities as equivalent to internationally expected IEC-based fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-2-aligned and IEC 62619-aligned documentation for Nepal project review and any applicable lender or project-owner technical requirements.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被尼泊尔地方主管机关认可为与国际预期IEC标准消防安全安装要求等效。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在尼泊尔项目审查及任何适用的贷款方或项目业主技术要求中，补充符合IEC 62933-5-2和IEC 62619要求的文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被尼泊爾地方主管機關認可為與國際預期IEC標準消防安全安裝要求等效。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在尼泊爾項目審查及任何適用的貸款方或項目業主技術要求中，補充符合IEC 62933-5-2和IEC 62619要求的文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: No single national BESS fire-safety installation code has been confirmed for Nepal. Fire and building approval is required from the relevant local municipality before commissioning of any commercial or industrial BESS installation. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Nepal project specifications, international lender requirements, or the IEC-based safety baselines expected in project technical documentation. Exporters and project teams should: (a) identify the relevant local municipality authority for fire and building approval at the project site; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-2 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, fire suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) ensure cell and module safety is documented under IEC 62619 as the international standard expected by project owners, lenders, and NEA technical review; (d) engage a fire protection consultant or engineer familiar with Nepal building and fire requirements at the design stage; (e) verify whether the project's financing institution (ADB, World Bank, bilateral DFIs) imposes specific BESS fire-safety standards as loan conditions.
gap.zh: 差距：尼泊尔尚无经确认的单一全国性BESS消防安全安装规范。任何商业或工业BESS装置在调试前均须取得相关地方市政机构的消防和建筑审批。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足尼泊尔项目规格、国际贷款方要求或项目技术文件中预期的IEC标准安全基准。出口商和项目团队应：（a）确认项目所在地负责消防和建筑审批的相关地方市政机构；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、消防抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）确保电芯和模组安全依据IEC 62619记录，IEC 62619是项目业主、贷款方和NEA技术审查预期的国际标准；（d）在设计阶段聘请熟悉尼泊尔建筑和消防要求的消防顾问或工程师；（e）核实项目融资机构（亚行、世行、双边开发金融机构）是否将特定BESS消防安全标准作为贷款条件。
gap.zht: 差距：尼泊爾尚無經確認的單一全國性BESS消防安全安裝規範。任何商業或工業BESS裝置在調試前均須取得相關地方市政機構的消防和建築審批。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足尼泊爾項目規格、國際貸款方要求或項目技術文件中預期的IEC標準安全基準。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）確認項目所在地負責消防和建築審批的相關地方市政機構；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、消防抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）確保電芯和模組安全依據IEC 62619記錄，IEC 62619是項目業主、貸款方和NEA技術審查預期的國際標準；（d）在設計階段聘請熟悉尼泊爾建築和消防要求的消防顧問或工程師；（e）核實項目融資機構（亞行、世行、雙邊開發金融機構）是否將特定BESS消防安全標準作為貸款條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — local municipality fire and building approval is required before commissioning commercial and industrial BESS in Nepal; no confirmed single national BESS fire code as of dataset date — verify with the relevant local authority and project owner
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — IEC 62933-5-2 Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No single national BESS fire-safety installation code has been confirmed for Nepal; fire and building approval is administered by local municipality authorities. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Nepal project specifications or international IEC-based lender and project-owner requirements. Prepare IEC 62933-5-2-aligned fire-safety design documentation and IEC 62619 cell safety evidence. Identify and engage the relevant local municipality authority and, where applicable, verify lender-imposed fire-safety conditions at the earliest project stage before committing to system design.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔尚无经确认的单一全国性BESS消防安全安装规范；消防和建筑审批由地方市政主管机关负责。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足尼泊尔项目规格或基于IEC的国际贷款方和项目业主要求。请准备符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的消防安全设计文件和IEC 62619电芯安全证据。在系统设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段确认并接触相关地方市政主管机关，并在适用情况下核实贷款方规定的消防安全条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾尚無經確認的單一全國性BESS消防安全安裝規範；消防和建築審批由地方市政主管機關負責。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足尼泊爾項目規格或基於IEC的國際貸款方和項目業主要求。請準備符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的消防安全設計文件和IEC 62619電芯安全證據。在系統設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段確認並接觸相關地方市政主管機關，並在適用情況下核實貸款方規定的消防安全條件。
